_comment: Panviz render defaults. Copy and edit, then pass with `panviz render --config <file>`. Any key may be overridden on the command line. Keys starting with '_' are ignored.
_precedence: built-in defaults < PANVIZ_* env vars < --config file < CLI flags.
_env_note: Env overrides: PANVIZ_INPUT_ROOT, PANVIZ_OUT_ROOT, PANVIZ_REBUILD_ROOT, PANVIZ_BROWSER (and PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH for browser detection).
_paths_note: input_root and browser are deployment-specific; browser is auto-detected when installed via `playwright install chromium`. Override any of these for your environment.
